# Changelog — 2026-04-14
*Generated by Agent 14a/14b — Self-Awareness Pipeline, fourth cycle*

---

## Narrative Summary

April 14 was a productive execution day with no new formal decisions but significant conceptual developments. Tom's morning walk introduced a major reframing of C2A2 as proof-of-concept for AI-driven interdisciplinary science (ASSUMPTION-017), alongside a concrete pause on Phase 2a tripling and a deep dive connecting PRESUMPTION-007 to Kuhnian paradigm shift theory. The wiki daily run broke through the 76-PRS plateau with Hoffman/Prakash trace logic ingestion (+4 PRS, +4 connections), and FINDING-011 (SUPER-BRIDGE) was elevated as the system's deepest cross-tradition signal to date. Infrastructure issues persisted (Day 5 of wiki auth failure, plus git lock and stale Gmail), but the operational pipeline continued to produce: 2 new specialist proposals, completed second lit search cycle, and clean Agent 16 run. The self-awareness pipeline extracted 5 new assumptions and 5 new presumptions, with the most significant cluster questioning whether C2A2 can reliably validate its own outputs (PRESUMPTION-020, 021, and the continued prominence of PRESUMPTION-014).

---

## Changes Detected

CHANGE-2026-04-14-001:
  Type: Conceptual reframing
  Description: Tom explicitly reframed C2A2 as proof-of-concept for a new kind of AI-driven interdisciplinary science during the morning walk. AI does "first-pass synthesis," humans become "validators and accelerators, not gatekeepers." This is the first time the project's mission has been articulated at this level of ambition.
  Impact: If adopted as the operating frame, this changes success criteria — C2A2 succeeds not just by producing a wiki but by demonstrating a generalizable methodology. Captured as ASSUMPTION-017.
  Source: Morning walk chat summary, 2026-04-14

CHANGE-2026-04-14-002:
  Type: Operational pause
  Description: Phase 2a tripling (Hawkins×3, Friston×3, Levin×3) explicitly paused. Tom worked through pilot design options (2 collaborating, 2 non-collaborating, 3+ agents) during the walk and concluded that OPEN-004 (agent differentiation strategy) must be resolved first.
  Impact: Phase 2a timeline shifts from April 14-15 to TBD. DECISION-010 remains approved in principle but unimplemented. Three open questions raised: OPEN-004 (differentiation), OPEN-015 (paradigm shift detector), OPEN-016 (PRESUMPTION-007 operationalization).
  Source: Morning walk chat summary, 2026-04-14

CHANGE-2026-04-14-003:
  Type: Pipeline milestone
  Description: Wiki daily run successfully ingested Hoffman/Prakash trace logic material. PRS count increased from 76 to 80 (+4). Cross-connections from 31 to 35 (+4). Two new findings: FINDING-011 (SUPER-BRIDGE, ⚑⚑⚑ priority) and FINDING-012 (super-cluster convergence).
  Impact: Breaks the 4-day PRS freeze. FINDING-011 is the deepest cross-tradition signal found — potential three-level mathematical unification of the Consciousness Cluster. However, depth assessment is internal (see PRESUMPTION-021).
  Source: Wiki daily run session, 2026-04-14

CHANGE-2026-04-14-004:
  Type: New proposals
  Description: Hawkins and Hoffman specialist agents produced 2 proposals: PROP-2026-04-14-001 (Monty/Thousand Brains Systems evaluation, showing 8 orders of magnitude computational savings) and PROP-2026-04-14-002 (Hoffman's Spacetime Bounds on Consciousness with Chord/Arpeggio framework). 7 cross-tradition links noted.
  Impact: Proposal backlog increases to ~42. Cross-tradition signals rich but unvalidated (see PRESUMPTION-014, ASSUMPTION-021). Hoffman's Chord condition is a genuinely new theoretical development with testable implications across multiple traditions.
  Source: Hawkins/Hoffman specialist agent session, 2026-04-14

CHANGE-2026-04-14-005:
  Type: Pipeline completion
  Description: Lit search pipeline completed second full cycle. 7 items from April 13 evening run all dispositioned. Total: 32/32 items searched and dispositioned. Queue now empty (before today's new items).
  Impact: Self-awareness pipeline fully caught up on prior items. All 32 items carry complete provenance chains. 11 REVISE items await Tom's review.
  Source: Lit search pipeline session, 2026-04-14

CHANGE-2026-04-14-006:
  Type: Self-awareness extraction
  Description: Agent 14a extracted 5 new assumptions (ASSUMPTION-017 through 021). Agent 14b surfaced 5 new presumptions (PRESUMPTION-019 through 023). All 10 items queued for 15a/15b. Total items in self-awareness registry: 44 (21 assumptions + 23 presumptions).
  Impact: New cluster of presumptions (019-021) forms an "epistemic validation gap" theme — questioning whether C2A2 can reliably distinguish signal from noise in its own outputs. This is the system's most important open problem.
  Source: Self-awareness pipeline (this session), 2026-04-14

CHANGE-2026-04-14-007:
  Type: Open questions
  Description: Three new open questions added: OPEN-015 (paradigm shift detector design), OPEN-016 (operationalizing PRESUMPTION-007 via Kuhnian contextual interpretation), OPEN-017 (REVISE queue scalability).
  Impact: OPEN-017 is structurally interesting — it identifies a meta-level repetition of the proposal review bottleneck pattern (ASSUMPTION-012) at the self-awareness layer.
  Source: Self-awareness pipeline analysis, 2026-04-14
